docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 76775221) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUEFORD, ALEXIS $327.84 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $727.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75783600) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BLUEFORD, ALEXIS DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2025

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75783600) TO PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC
